subject: Question from a planner
body:
Hi {greeting_name},

I'm an urban planner working on a new approach to help towns and cities develop comprehensive plans faster and more affordably while still reflecting local goals and community priorities.

I'm reaching out because I'd value the perspective of someone actively working in local government planning. Would you be willing to share 5–10 minutes of candid feedback about your experience with comprehensive planning—what works well, where the process becomes difficult, and what would make the greatest difference for municipal staff?

I'm not selling anything. I'm simply trying to better understand the realities planners face so I can build something genuinely useful.

Thank you for considering the request, and I appreciate the work you do for your community.

Sincerely,

Vaidila Satvika, AICP
